clue: This killer can punish survivors from far away if they move too predictably.
hints: Her audio presence is very recognizable.
Her power is thrown, not placed.

clue: This killer does not respect loops in the way most killers have to.
hints: Walls are less reliable against her.
Her power is movement-based, but not a dash.

clue: This killer can make a chase feel like a guessing game where sight is not always enough.
hints: Audio and scratch marks matter a lot against her.
Her story is tied to the Yamaoka family.

clue: This killer can make survivors waste precious time before the real chase even matters.
hints: Her pressure is tied to a second objective placed on survivors.
The traps are not on the ground.

clue: This killer makes the trial feel less reliable once survivors are pulled into his world.
hints: Sleep matters.
His power is tied to dreams.

clue: This killer treats violence like a show and the trial like a stage.
hints: His weapon pressure comes in many small hits.
His style is tied to bright performance and fame.

clue: This killer can pressure survivors from far away through something dark, loud, and hard to ignore.
hints: Her power is good at checking generators from distance.
Bird imagery is the key.

clue: This killer feels old, powerful, and tied to something much stranger than a normal chase.
hints: Their design leans supernatural and ancient.
This is one of your newer owned killers.

clue: This killer turns machinery, performance, and something not-quite-human into fear.
hints: The name itself hints at what it is.
Think horror built around a moving machine.

clue: This killer's presence can make ordinary technology feel cursed.
hints: Survivors can carry something connected to her power.
Screens are one of the biggest signs.

clue: This killer is not really one person, even if only one body is chasing you at a time.
hints: Their pressure gets worse when survivors are grouped up.
Their identity is shared between several names.
